subject: English
title: The Lost Child – Easy Short Notes

key_points: The story 'The Lost Child' is written by Mulk Raj Anand
A small child goes to a fair with his parents during the spring festival
The child is fascinated by toys, sweets, balloons, and other attractions
He gets separated from his parents in the crowded fair
After getting lost, he realises that his parents are more important than the attractions
characters: The Lost Child – Innocent, curious, and playful
The Kind Man – A stranger who tries to comfort the lost child
literary_devices: Imagery – Descriptions of mustard fields and colourful fair
Contrast – Joyful beginning and fearful ending
exam_tips: Remember that the child realises the importance of parents only after getting lost
Focus on the emotional transformation of the child
Mention the fair as the main setting
Highlight the theme of parental love
